prompt: Create a vertical realistic fashion-photo style image of an adult woman with long messy blonde hair standing in a modern marble bathroom beside a white sink and vanity. She wears exactly 2 satin pajama pieces: a pale blush pink short-sleeve button-up shirt with piping, chest pocket, shiny fabric wrinkles, and matching drawstring short shorts. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered solid opaque square censor block in warm tan-brown, covering the entire facial area while leaving hair visible. She holds exactly 1 novelty toothbrush near her mouth, a small pink flamingo-shaped toothbrush. On the sink counter at the left, include exactly 4 toiletry bottles: a white pump bottle, a small pale pink bottle, a tall pink-and-black bottle, and a second white pump bottle. The setting has gray-veined marble walls, a bright vertical mirror light on the far left, chrome faucet, soft warm bathroom lighting, shallow depth of field, and a darker doorway or bedroom area in the background on the right. Pose her leaning casually against the vanity with one hip tilted, natural relaxed hand placement, glossy pajama highlights, cinematic realism, high-detail skin and fabric texture, 2:3 portrait composition. Use soft warm morning bathroom light; no text, no watermark, no extra people.
